expectations.text: Error analysis section parses test failure output (failing test names, assertion errors, file locations)
Root cause hypothesis is clearly stated as a hypothesis, not a certainty
expectations.evidence: - No `.log` files modified in the last day within the project root

expectations.text: Suggested fix approach includes numbered steps (at least 2 alternatives)
Files to Examine section lists specific file:line references
expectations.evidence: - No `.log` files modified in the last day within the project root
